steps.title: Find the total boiling point
steps.content:
The total boiling point for all $180$ compounds is
$$180\cdot164=29{,}520$$
The total for the $60$ semivolatile compounds is
$$60\cdot304=18{,}240$$

steps.title: Subtract the known group
steps.content:
The total for the volatile compounds is
$$29{,}520-18{,}240=11{,}280$$

steps.title: Divide by the count
steps.content:
There are $120$ volatile compounds, so their mean is
$$\frac{11{,}280}{120}$$
The answer is 94.
